description.content:
The Vanta REST API enables organizations to programmatically manage their security compliance posture. The API supports personnel management, vulnerability monitoring, resource scoping, document and test management, control oversight, vendor management, and custom integrations. Vanta helps automate compliance for SOC 2, ISO 27001, HIPAA, PCI DSS, and GDPR frameworks.

Contact Support:
 Name: Vanta Developer Hub
